sql_array: CREATE TABLE time_logs (id INTEGER, log_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO time_logs VALUES (1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + INTERVAL 5 HOUR);
INSERT INTO time_logs VALUES (2, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + INTERVAL 10 HOUR - INTERVAL 1 HOUR);
SELECT id, log_time, log_time - INTERVAL 2 HOUR FROM time_logs;
UPDATE time_logs SET log_time = log_time - INTERVAL 1 HOUR WHERE id = 1;
